title: Spoke a full options wheel strategy into my Mac and it built itself -no code, runs on automatically
author: BuildwithPublic
selftext:
Been building these all day but this one is the one that got me.

The wheel is one of the most popular income strategies in options. Sell a put, collect premium. If you get assigned shares, sell calls above your cost basis. If the shares get called away, start over. Collect income the whole time.

Traders have been managing this by hand for years. Checking prices, picking strikes, rolling positions, setting reminders. Every single week.

I sat down at my Mac and just spoke the whole thing out loud. Plain English. Like I was explaining it to someone.

"Sell a put on Apple every Monday at the 25 delta. If I get assigned, sell calls above what I paid. If the shares get called away, start over with a new put. Send me a notification on every trade."

It asked me a couple clarifying questions. Then it built the full workflow. Now it runs every Monday in my live brokerage account.

Didn't write code. Didn't click through order tickets. Didn't even type. I just talked. 

What strategies are you guys running that you'd want to automate like this? I'm building these all day.

https://reddit.com/link/1s9ndow/video/myld6xsyhlsg1/player

comments.author: blkveil
comments.body: Very nice! How long were you on their waitlist for this? I see it’s Preview so I’m assuming you signed up for some beta program. Looking forward for this. How does it handle group orders, such as: Buy SPY 0DTE ITM call and upon fill set a limit sell at 30% profit and a stop loss of 10%

comments.author: dogazine4570
comments.body: lol that’s kinda wild. ngl the wheel sounds “easy” until you hit a fast drop and you’re bagholding for months, so automating it would def save some mental energy. just hope it’s not blindly selling puts into earnings week 😅
